reviews.review_title: Great game to show off VR
reviews.review_description: I had a blast going through this game. Each stage shows a unique action needed to play and has many creative ways of using various control schemes to change things up. It's a short game full of mini games, but I think it accomplished exactly what the developer wanted to showcase. Great job!

This developer knew exactly what they wanted to make and it’s darn near perfect for what it is. It’s a collection of small mini games and they all work so well and had me smiling the whole time. The car level I wish could be turned into a full game! This is a great into to vr game, or a fantastic between game cleanse to mess around with. Well worth the small asking price.  The under water level left me a bit motion sick until I fully got the controls down, but once I did, I was zooming around the water!

reviews.review_title: Only possible in VR-a small gem of akind
reviews.review_description: The ideas presented in this set of mini games are only possible in VR. Recommend it to anyone that for a small price is looking for something easy to jump in and out for a short bursts of pure fun!

Got for free. 
Fun array of mini games. Good use of different styles of play. Nice way to show off aspects of VR
Fun quick and easy games great for VR noobs and young children getting in to VR but all round fun for the full family

reviews.review_title: I had fun but not sure worth the price
reviews.review_description: Disclaimer: I got the game for free. Good mini game collection with a lot of variety but lacks replayability. Some games are also much better than others. Some are too short others go on for a bit too long. I'd personally like to see more levels of these mini games: 1st person baloon, side scrolling medieval knight and rc car hitting stuff (from the top of my head). I could see all these being full games with enough different levels added to them, even better if more levels were added here. Personally I'd say the price point is a bit too much for what it offers.

This game has a lot of potential for sure. The concept is a vr WARIOWARE. But with only 13 mini games included and no multiplayer 5$ feels a little steep. With some more expansion and an option for party play it would be a recommend. I was given a copy for free.
i like that there was lots of variety of the games.  they are well made and well thought out. very fun
